overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulator showing nighttime highway driving in heavy rain. The player drives a BMW, overtaking slower vehicles and following a large truck through wet conditions with active windshield wipers.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway at night in heavy rain

events.description: initiating overtake of slower vehicle on the left lane
completing overtake of white sedan, moving back to right lane

agents.ego_description: driving at highway speed in heavy rain, overtaking a slower vehicle on the left side

notable_agents.action: silver sedan being overtaken on the left, falling behind
white sedan driving ahead before being overtaken

entered.detail: black leather steering wheel with BMW logo and control buttons
illuminated analog speedometer and tachometer with orange needles
glowing white display screen in the center console
metal highway guardrail with reflective markers
tall highway lighting poles illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person driving from inside a BMW on a rainy highway at night. The driver overtakes a silver car on the left while following a white sedan ahead. The windshield wipers are active, and street lights illuminate the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with concrete barriers approaching a large truck

events.description: large white truck comes into view ahead in the distance
slowing down to maintain safe following distance behind the truck

agents.ego_description: following a large commercial truck on the highway, adjusting speed to maintain distance

notable_agents.action: large white box truck driving ahead with bright red taillights

entered.detail: concrete highway barrier on the left side of the road
concrete highway barrier replacing the metal guardrail

segments.scene_description: The driver continues on the highway as the environment transitions to a section with concrete barriers. A large white truck appears ahead and becomes the primary focus as the car approaches it. The rain continues with wipers sweeping across the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway following large truck with passing traffic

events.description: red sports car overtakes on the right side at high speed
another vehicle passes on the right in the adjacent lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining position behind the large truck while other vehicles overtake on the right

notable_agents.action: large truck continuing straight ahead in the same lane
red sports car overtaking quickly on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car following closely behind the large truck on the rain-soaked highway. A red sports car and other vehicles overtake on the right side. The concrete barriers line both sides of the road as the journey continues through the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a nighttime highway drive that shifts from open lanes of traffic to a constrained corridor behind a heavy vehicle. It begins with the driver overtaking a silver car while following a white sedan, with active windshield wipers clearing the heavy rain under the glow of street lights. As the car progresses, the open road transitions into a section enclosed by concrete barriers, and a large white truck emerges as the primary focus of the path. The scene then tightens as the camera follows closely behind the truck's rear, while a red sports car and other vehicles streak past on the right. Finally, the journey continues through the rain-soaked night, locked between the concrete walls and the looming presence of the truck.
